dataset: AMD Ryzen / Zen CPU specs and benchmark export
join_rules: Export_Benchmark_Official.CPU_ID joins to Export_CPU_Specs.CPU_ID when Website Include = Yes.
Website Include = Inventory Only means official-only inventory; do not create a full CPU page until specs are added.
chart_rules: Use Export_Benchmark_Web for Web Median / Mixed Power charts.
Use Export_Benchmark_Official for official TDP profile charts.
Do not mix Web Median / Mixed Power and Official TDP Profile scores without clear labels.
Official charts must include Official Power Profile as filter or legend.
column_policy: CSV/JSON preserve exact Excel export column names and order.
